ddls:
CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article (e.g., Reuters, Bloomberg) */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the news article */,
  "company_ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol of the company mentioned in the news article */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Score indicating the relevance of the article to the company */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the news article (e.g., earnings, product launch, scandal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis result */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news article being analyzed */,
  "positivity" REAL /* Positivity score of the news article */,
  "subjectivity" REAL /* Subjectivity score of the news article */,
  "buy" INTEGER /* Buy signal based on sentiment analysis */,
  "sell" INTEGER /* Sell signal based on sentiment analysis */,
  "decline" INTEGER /* Decline signal based on sentiment analysis */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence score of the sentiment analysis */,
  "polarity" TEXT /* Overall polarity of the news article (positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the sentiment analysis */,
  "relevance_to_company" REAL /* Score indicating how relevant the sentiment is to the company mentioned in the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES news_articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scandal_detection" (
  "scandal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scandal detection result */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news article being analyzed */,
  "scandal_score" REAL /* Scandal score of the news article */,
  "text_snippet" TEXT /* Relevant text snippet indicating potential scandal */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence score of the scandal detection */,
  "scandal_type" TEXT /* Type of scandal detected (e.g., financial misconduct, insider trading) */,
  "scandal_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the detected scandal */,
  "relevance_to_company" REAL /* Score indicating how relevant the scandal is to the company mentioned in the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scandal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scandal_detection_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES news_articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
